featureSections.title: Full-Service Mobile Mechanic – At Your Doorstep
featureSections.body: Why waste hours at a shop? Our certified technicians bring the garage to you. Whether at home, work, or on the roadside, we handle everything from oil changes to engine diagnostics.
bullets: No towing needed – we come to you
featureSections.cardBody: We serve all of Dallas, including Uptown, Oak Lawn, Lakewood, and more. Call to confirm your location.

featureSections.title: ASE-Certified Technicians – Quality You Can Trust
featureSections.body: Every mechanic is ASE-certified and equipped with advanced tools. We use quality parts and provide warranties on all repairs.
featureSections.cardBody: Full liability insurance and licensing for your peace of mind.

cta.headline: Ready for Hassle-Free Auto Repair?

servicesPage.intro: Comprehensive mobile auto repair and maintenance services in Dallas, TX. Our certified mechanics handle everything from routine care to major repairs – all at your location.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with our mobile oil change service.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are vital for engine health. We come to you with quality oils (conventional, synthetic, high-mileage) and replace your oil filter, check all fluids, and dispose of old oil properly.

process.title: Schedule
process.description: Book a time that works for you – we come to your location.

process.title: Service
process.description: Our technician drains old oil, replaces filter, and fills with new oil.

process.title: Check
process.description: We check other fluids and provide a report.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000–5,000 miles for conventional, up to 7,500 for synthetic. Check your owner's manual.

faqs.question: Do you dispose of the old oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recycle all fluids responsibly.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Safe, reliable brake service at your home or office.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your car's most important safety feature. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines, and replace worn components with high-quality parts. All work is done on-site.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We test brake performance and measure pad thickness.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace worn pads/rotors, resurface if needed, and bleed system.

process.title: Test
process.description: Full test drive to ensure proper operation.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need replacing?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, or a soft pedal are signs. We offer free inspections.

faqs.question: Can you replace brakes in my driveway?
faqs.answer: Yes, we bring all tools and parts. No need to visit a shop.

services.title: Battery & Electrical Diagnostics
services.shortDescription: Fast battery testing and electrical system repair on-site.
services.longDescription: Dead battery? Alternator issues? Our mobile service includes battery testing, replacement, and electrical diagnostics for starting and charging systems. We carry common batteries for most makes and models.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We test battery voltage, alternator output, and starter draw.

process.title: Replace
process.description: Install new battery or repair electrical components.

process.title: Verify
process.description: Re-test system to ensure everything works.

faqs.question: How long does a car battery last?
faqs.answer: Typically 3–5 years. Extreme heat or cold can shorten lifespan.

faqs.question: Do you install batteries from any brand?
faqs.answer: We stock top brands like Interstate and Optima. We can also install customer-provided batteries.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Check Engine Light
services.shortDescription: Professional diagnostic service to identify and fix engine issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on, we come to you. Our advanced scanners read codes, and our experienced technicians diagnose the root cause – from oxygen sensors to catalytic converters. We explain the issue and provide a clear repair plan.
benefits: Prevent minor issues from becoming major

process.title: Scan
process.description: Connect diagnostic tool to read error codes.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: Interpret codes and inspect related components.

process.title: Advise
process.description: Provide repair options and cost estimate.

faqs.question: Can you reset my check engine light?
faqs.answer: We can clear codes after repairs, but resetting without fixing the issue is not recommended.

faqs.question: Will you come to me even for diagnostics?
faqs.answer: Yes, we perform all diagnostics at your location.

about.headline: Your Trusted Mobile Mechanic in Dallas
about.mission: To provide Dallas drivers with convenient, high-quality auto repair without the hassle of traditional shops.
story: Dallas Mobile Auto Repair & Maintenance was founded by ASE-certified mechanics who saw a need for honest, convenient car care. Tired of long wait times and upselling at brick-and-mortar shops, we decided to bring the garage to our customers. Since day one, we've focused on transparency, quality, and customer convenience.

Today, we serve hundreds of Dallas residents and businesses every year. Our team continues to invest in training and tools to stay ahead of modern vehicle technology. We're proud to be a trusted name in mobile auto repair, helping our community stay safe on the road.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We only recommend repairs you truly need, with upfront pricing.

coreValues.title: Convenience
coreValues.description: We come to your location, saving you time and hassle.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every repair is done right with quality parts and certified technicians.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and get the job done efficiently.
